title: Halbach Seidenbänder Decorative Ribbon with Linen Edges Width 15 mm Length 20 m Red/Linen
features: Half silk ribbon: you will receive a roll of linen ribbon in width: 15 mm, length: 20 m
Gift ribbon for decoration purposes: the ribbon is ideal for high-quality packaging of gifts as well as for decorating festive occasions
Attention to detail: the carefully filigree ribbon is available in 2 widths and many different colours

Made in Germany: not only the entire production of the linen band takes place in Germany, but also our plastic bobbins come from Germany. These are 100% recyclable and very stable. Thanks to the short delivery routes, you make a contribution to the environment.

Robust and durable: the beautiful and delicate linen ribbon not only looks good, but is also very stable, thanks to the sewn-in linen edge. It is washable at 30 degrees and even suitable for outdoor use. The ribbon is colourfast, meaning it does not fade or stain.
description: Decorative ribbon with linen edge ideal for decorating, decorating and designing gifts
